title: diyn #1777
definition:
1) to judge, contend, plead
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to act as judge, minister judgment
        1a2) to plead a cause
        1a3) to execute judgment, requite, vindicate
        1a4) to govern
        1a5) to contend, strive
    1b) (Niphal) to be at strife, quarrel
nasbUsage:

        1a2) to plead a cause
        1a3) to execute judgment, requite, vindicate

    NASB:  to judge
